title: Grilled Wagyu Kebabs with Egyptian Spices
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring tender Wagyu kebabs, infused with the essence of Egyptian spices and grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the Wagyu beef cubes to the spice mixture and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated beef onto the kebabs, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and grill for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your liking.
Brush the kebabs with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
